data.name: AcceptanceBody
data.value: By accessing or using the MotoRent platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not access or use our services. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and MotoRent Co., Ltd.

data.name: DescriptionBody
data.value: MotoRent provides a cloud-based software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform designed for motorbike and vehicle rental business management. Our services include fleet management, rental tracking, customer management, document scanning, maintenance scheduling, and financial reporting tools. The platform is delivered via web browser and progressive web application.

data.name: AccountBody
data.value: To use MotoRent, you must register an account using a valid Google or Microsoft account via OAuth authentication. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

data.name: BillingBody
data.value: MotoRent offers Free, Pro, and Ultra subscription plans. Paid plans are billed on a monthly or annual recurring basis. All prices are quoted in Thai Baht (MYR) and are subject to 7% Value Added Tax (VAT). Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless cancelled before the renewal date. You may upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time, with changes taking effect at the next billing cycle.

data.name: AcceptableUseBody
data.value: You agree to use MotoRent only for lawful purposes related to managing your vehicle rental business. You shall not misuse the platform, attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, upload malicious content, or use the service in any way that violates applicable Thai laws or regulations. You are responsible for the accuracy of all data you enter into the platform.

data.name: IntellectualPropertyBody
data.value: All intellectual property rights in the MotoRent platform, including software, design, trademarks, and documentation, are owned by MotoRent Co., Ltd. Your subscription grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the platform for its intended purpose. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the platform.

data.name: DataProtectionBody
data.value: We are committed to protecting your data in accordance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA). For details on how we collect, use, and protect your personal information, please refer to our Privacy Policy. You retain ownership of all business data you enter into the platform.

data.name: LiabilityBody
data.value: To the maximum extent permitted under Thai law, including the Unfair Contract Terms Act B.E. 2540, MotoRent shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid for your subscription in the twelve months preceding the claim. This limitation does not apply to liability that cannot be excluded under Thai law.

data.name: TerminationBody
data.value: You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. MotoRent may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or fail to pay subscription fees. Upon termination, your access to the platform will cease and your data will be retained for 90 days, after which it may be permanently deleted. You may request a data export before termination takes effect.

data.name: GoverningLawBody
data.value: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Thailand.

data.name: ContactBody
data.value: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@motorent.app or through the contact form on our website.
